name: Attica Township Park Courts
description: New 10/2023, 2 dedicated permanent pickleball courts at Attica Township Park.  Free to use.

name: Imlay Township Hall and Parks
description: Come play pickleball at Imlay Township Hall and Parks in Imlay City, MI! There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and wheelchair accessibility. The courts are free.

name: Lapeer Community Center
description: Outdoor courts are free, indoor requires membership or small fee
